_comment: NeerNet offline pack index. Pack downloads require an internet connection on first use.

packs.name: Kerala, India
packs.description: Basemap style for Kerala. Uses the live OpenFreeMap liberty style (requires internet for first cache). For a real offline PMTiles extract, host a kerala.pmtiles file and update pmtiles_url.
packs._note: pmtiles_url points to the global planet file (~80 GB). For production, host a Kerala region extract and update this URL.

packs.name: Sample – Local file (dev)
packs.description: Serves a local PMTiles file from public/sample.pmtiles. Copy any .pmtiles file there and update the URL.
